hook: Stop shipping roadmap theater — your backlog is lying to you and your sprint demos prove nothing about revenue.
The CRM migration wasn't the bottleneck — your champion ghosted because nobody measured adoption past week one.
If your onboarding checklist has seventeen steps, you don't have onboarding — you have homework disguised as enablement.
Pricing pages confuse buyers when tiers overlap — tighten positioning around job-to-be-done.
Outbound templates fatigue fast — rotate angles weekly or replies crater.
Case studies help mid-funnel — strip jargon so prospects recognize themselves.
